{{Missing Info|specifies=<br>Image}}
{{CargoRelic
|name=Golden Menorah
|rank=Blue
|affct=FTH
|birthday=11-26
|source=* Lottery Machine (0.36%), {{RewardIconWithText|Novice Scroll, (5%)}}, Wishing (10.6%)
* [[Must-Not-Name]] - [[Rare Rent]]
|description=On Nov 26, 165 BC, the Jews lit the candles and their hearts.

When the Seleucid Empire's rule in Palestine ended, Judas Maccabeus, a descendant of the ancient Jewish priest Aaron, led an uprising to destroy the altars of the Olympus gods to remove all traces of pagans. In the end, the Jews burned the temple. They lit the seven candles on the Golden Menorah, which signified the power of God who gave mankind light in the very beginning. 

|fame=24
|art=24
|fth=44
|civ=28
|tech=34
|ss1=Per 4 Gacha Gawd Packs claimed, Snail HP +20, <br> Gacha Gawd Packs Claimed: 40/40
|ss2=Per 4 Gacha Gawd Packs claimed, Snail HP +40, <br> Gacha Gawd Packs Claimed: 40/40
|ss3=Per 4 Gacha Gawd Packs claimed, Snail HP +60, <br> Gacha Gawd Packs Claimed: 40/40
|ss4=Per 4 Gacha Gawd Packs claimed, Snail HP +100, <br> Gacha Gawd Packs Claimed: 40/40
|ss7=Per 4 Gacha Gawd Packs claimed, Snail HP +100, <br> Gacha Gawd Packs Claimed: 40/40 <br> Snail HP +500
|skill1=[[File:Compass skill I.png|50px]]Place in Exploration Compass: FTH Checks -5
}}

[[Category:HP Boost]]
[[Category:Gacha Gawd Packs Boost]]
[[Category:Exploration Compass Boost]]
[[Category:FTH Boost]]
[[Category:DEF Boost]]
[[Category:Relic Boost]]
[[Category:ATK Boost]]
[[Category:Missing Info]]
